summary: The test suite is exceptional. It covers all functional requirements (max-age, max-size, keep-latest) and effectively manages time-dependent logic using a reference-time flag. The implementation of a dual-layer testing strategy—using bats for unit/functional testing and a custom run-tests.sh harness to validate the GitHub Actions workflow via act—is a perfect fulfillment of the complex task requirements. Edge cases for size limits and combined policies are thoroughly addressed.
